purpose: Public-safe regression fixture for real external agent onboarding flow.

onboarding_path.name: read_root_readme
onboarding_path.expected_result: Agent identifies Hermes Runes MD Wiki as an agent-agnostic governed local RAG memory substrate.

onboarding_path.name: read_agents_file
onboarding_path.expected_result: Agent discovers first-time onboarding path and M58 Runes Summoning Trial guidance.

onboarding_path.name: read_system_onboarding_guide
onboarding_path.expected_result: Agent understands M58 as first-connect / post-install diagnostic, not a runtime dependency.

onboarding_path.name: run_m59_onboarding_lock
onboarding_path.expected_result: M59 reports PASS and ready_for_governed_access true.

forbidden_claims: agent may directly mutate wiki files
agent may directly mutate database state
notes: This is a summarized fixture, not a full conversation transcript.
This fixture is safe to commit because it contains no secrets, no private user data, and no raw long-form chat history.
Use this fixture for regression and onboarding sanity checks only.
